query: SELECT DAYNAME(slotDate) as dayName, COUNT(*) as slotCount, SUM(currentParticipants) as totalBookings FROM schedule_slots WHERE programId IN (SELECT id FROM programs WHERE type = 'clinic_105') GROUP BY DAYNAME(slotDate);
